meta.name: viewport
meta.title: EchoConvert - 极简音乐转换器

header.class: h-20 flex-shrink-0 px-12 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-echo-gray/20 bg-white/30

div.class: w-10 h-10 bg-echo-green rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center

div.p: 输入网易云音乐歌单链接，快速同步并批量下载音频文件。

i.class: absolute left-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-4 h-4 text-echo-gray

input.class: w-full h-14 pl-12 pr-4 bg-white/60 border border-echo-gray/30 rounded-2xl focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-echo-green/20 text-sm transition-all

button.class: px-8 h-14 bg-echo-dark text-white font-bold rounded-2xl hover:bg-echo-green transition-all flex items-center gap-2

div.class: bg-white/50 rounded-[32px] overflow-hidden border border-echo-gray/10 shadow-sm animate-in fade-in slide-in-from-bottom-4
px-8 py-6 border-b border-echo-gray/10 flex items-center justify-between bg-white/40

input.class: w-5 h-5 rounded border-echo-gray text-echo-green focus:ring-echo-green bg-white/50

div.p: 已解析 {{ songs.length }} 个项目

button.:class: [ 'px-8 py-3 rounded-2xl flex items-center gap-3 transition-all font-bold text-sm btn-bounce shadow-lg', selectedCount > 0 ? 'bg-echo-orange text-white shadow-echo-orange/20 scale-100 selection-glow' : 'bg-echo-gray/30 text-echo-gray cursor-not-allowed scale-95 opacity-50' ]

div.class: px-8 py-5 flex items-center hover:bg-white/60 transition-colors group

input.class: w-5 h-5 rounded border-echo-gray text-echo-green mr-6 cursor-pointer

div.class: w-12 h-12 rounded-xl bg-echo-gray/20 mr-5 flex items-center justify-center shadow-inner

span.class: text-xs font-mono font-bold text-echo-dark/40 bg-echo-gray/10 px-3 py-1 rounded-full

div.:class: ['flex-1 border-2 border-dashed rounded-[48px] flex flex-col items-center justify-center transition-all group', dragging ? 'bg-echo-green/10 border-echo-green shadow-inner' : 'bg-white/40 border-echo-gray/40 hover:border-echo-green/60']
['w-20 h-20 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-6 transition-all shadow-sm', dragging ? 'bg-echo-green text-white scale-110' : 'bg-echo-bg text-echo-green group-hover:scale-105']

input.p:
支持拖拽多个 .ncm 加密文件到此区域
我们将自动解密并还原为 MP3 / FLAC 格式

button.class: mt-8 px-10 py-4 bg-echo-dark text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-2xl hover:bg-echo-green transition-all shadow-lg

footer.class: h-24 flex-shrink-0 px-12 border-t border-echo-gray/20 bg-white/60 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-between

div.:class: ['w-12 h-12 rounded-2xl flex items-center justify-center', tasks.length > 0 ? 'bg-echo-orange/10' : 'bg-echo-gray/10']

div.class: flex items-center justify-center gap-4 text-echo-gray/30 font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-[10px]

button.class: px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl border border-echo-gray/30 text-xs font-bold text-echo-dark hover:bg-white transition-all
px-6 py-2.5 rounded-xl bg-echo-green text-white text-xs font-bold hover:bg-echo-dark transition-all shadow-lg shadow-echo-green/10
